/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -march=native -DNDEBUG -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Xlinker -no_warn_duplicate_libraries CMakeFiles/lob_benchmarks.dir/benchmarks/bench_order_book.cpp.o -o lob_benchmarks  liblob_core.a _deps/googlebenchmark-build/src/libbenchmark.a _deps/googlebenchmark-build/src/libbenchmark_main.a _deps/googlebenchmark-build/src/libbenchmark.a
